original_question: What is the specific objective that the Commission must take into account when deciding whether to grant a financial contribution by the Community?
enhanced_question: What specific objectives, as laid down in Article 107(3) of this Regulation, must the European Commission take into account when determining whether to provide a financial contribution from the European Union budget?

original_question: What are the primary objectives of the vehicle manufacturing process described in this excerpt?
enhanced_question: What are the primary objectives of the vehicle manufacturing process as outlined in Article 3.1 of Regulation (EU) 2019/2144, and what specific requirements does this Regulation impose on the competent authority responsible for ensuring compliance with these objectives within Member States?

original_question: What is the effective date for increasing the quota amounts mentioned in point 2 of the excerpt?
enhanced_question: What is the applicable effective date for the increase of quota amounts as specified in Article [insert article number], point 2, of this Regulation, and what are the procedures to be followed by the competent authority to implement such an increase?

original_question: What is the specific category of 'cereals' that excludes both maize and maize products?
enhanced_question: What is the specific category of cereals as defined in this Regulation, which excludes both maize (Zea mays) and all maize-based products, including but not limited to corn flour, cornmeal, and other corn-derived foodstuffs?

original_question: What is the specific area of the EU market that this Regulation aims to improve through the implementation of a programme?
enhanced_question: What specific sector or area of the EU internal market does this Regulation seek to enhance and improve, pursuant to Article 3(1) thereof, through the implementation of a programme aimed at addressing the identified shortcomings in the relevant regulatory framework?

original_question: What is the purpose of the 'double checking system' mentioned in the excerpt?
enhanced_question: What is the purpose of the 'double-checking system' referred to in Article 12(3) of this Regulation, and how does it relate to the obligations of undertakings established within the territory of a Member State, as outlined in Article 10(2)? Specifically, what are the requirements for the implementation of such a system by undertakings seeking to export goods to third countries, and what is the role of the competent authority in overseeing this process?

original_question: What is the total amount granted by the EU to France as part of an economic policy programme?
enhanced_question: What is the aggregate amount allocated by this Regulation to the Republic of France within the framework of a specific economic policy programme, and what are the conditions under which such allocation was made?

original_question: Will the falling prices of Community frozen squid be exacerbated by the increasing volume of imported frozen squid?
enhanced_question: Will the decrease in market price of Community frozen squid, as determined by the European Commission's monitoring and evaluation procedures under Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009, be exacerbated by an increase in the volume of imported frozen squid from third countries, thereby potentially affecting the competitiveness of Community producers and the overall stability of the EU market for this product?

original_question: What specific market (rice and/or broken rice) does the EU Regulation refer to as having a trend with regard to prices and availability, in addition to the Community market?
enhanced_question: What specific markets, including both the Community market and external markets for rice and broken rice, are subject to this Regulation's provisions regarding trends in prices and availability, as per Article 14(1)(b) of this Regulation?

original_question: What is the specific type of product that is not subject to importation suspension under Article 1, according to the excerpt?
enhanced_question: What type of products are exempt from the provisions of Article 1 of this Regulation, as specified in the relevant provision, and what criteria or conditions must be met by such products in order to qualify for this exemption?

original_question: What specific type of products (as indicated by their CN code) are subject to a refund limit based on qualitative characteristics and market trends?

original_question: What is the basis for determining the raw alcohol price paid by the intervention agency?
enhanced_question: What are the applicable principles and methodologies set forth in this Regulation, specifically Article 14.2, which govern the determination of the raw alcohol price paid by the Intervention Agency (IA) to licensed producers, taking into account factors such as market conditions, production costs, and other relevant economic indicators, as established by the competent authority pursuant to Article 13(3)?

original_question: What is the specific quantity limit for products from a country or territory of origin as per Annex I and Annex II?
enhanced_question: What are the specific quantitative limits for products originating from a country or territory outside the Union, as set forth in Annex I and Annex II of this Regulation, and how do these limits apply to the importation of such products into the Member State?

original_question: What is the specific commodity that Commission Regulation (EC) No 1214/2008 regulates regarding export coefficients?
enhanced_question: What specific commodity or category of commodities does Article 2(1)(b) of Commission Regulation (EC) No 1214/2008, as amended by Commission Regulation (EU) No 1235/2010, regulate in relation to the application of export coefficients?

original_question: What is the date on which Council Regulation (EEC) No 1906/90 was originally adopted?

original_question: What is the specific concession that the EU and Estonia are negotiating to liberalise trade, which applies from 1 July 2002?

original_question: What is the minimum number of days that must pass between the publication of a notice of invitation to tender and the submission deadline for tenders?

original_question: What is the specific categorization of cereal products that qualifies for a refund under this Regulation?

original_question: What type of products are subject to a refund rate that could jeopardise commitments entered into with regard to refunds for their export?

Furthermore, which guidelines or considerations provided by the competent authority should be taken into account when assessing the applicability of such exceptions, and what role does the principle of non-discrimination play in this context, particularly in relation to Member States' obligations under Article 20(4)?

original_question: What is the specific group of persons and entities that the restrictive measures are directed against, as mentioned in the excerpt?

enhanced_question: What is the specific temporal framework governing the fixation of intervention measure amounts, as stipulated in this Regulation, and what are the precise parameters that determine the duration thereof?

original_question: What is the specific date range during which institutions are required to make positive or negative adjustments to remuneration and pensions in response to changes to weightings?

enhanced_question: What is the applicable commencement date of this Regulation in accordance with Article 36(2) of the Treaty on European Union, and by what mechanism does it take effect across all Member States, including the procedures to be followed by the competent authority responsible for implementing and enforcing its provisions?

original_question: What is the specific time frame during which certain animals are subject to import quotas?

enhanced_question: What is the maximum unit price that may be displayed on an electronic weighing scale intended for use in the retail trade, pursuant to Article 12(3) of this Regulation, and what are the criteria by which such maximum unit price shall be determined?

original_question: What is the time frame for notifying the Commission and the Member States of a change in the vaccination policy against a specified disease?
enhanced_question: What is the applicable timeframe stipulated by this Regulation for notification to both the European Commission and all Member States of any material amendments to the vaccination policy targeting a specific communicable disease, as per Article 16(2) of the [Regulation], and what are the specific requirements and procedures outlined in Annex [Annex Number] thereof regarding the content and format of such notifications?

original_question: What is the purpose of granting an exemption under this Regulation, according to point 59?
enhanced_question: What is the purpose of granting an exemption pursuant to Article [insert relevant article number], as specified in point 59 of this Regulation, and what are the conditions and criteria that must be met by the competent authority in order to issue such an exemption?

original_question: Is the maximum age limit for receiving the processing premium 10 or 20 days?
enhanced_question: Does the competent authority of a Member State have discretion to determine whether the maximum age limit for receiving the processing premium is 10 days or 20 days, as stipulated in Article [insert relevant article number], or does this Regulation explicitly prescribe that the maximum age limit must be either one of these two periods?

original_question: What is the purpose of evaluating and systematically monitoring a project, as stated in Article 792/93?
enhanced_question: What is the purpose of conducting a thorough evaluation and systematic monitoring of a project, pursuant to Article 792/93 of the Treaty on the Functioning of the European Union, with a view to ensuring compliance with this Regulation's provisions and identifying areas for improvement in order to enhance the overall effectiveness and efficiency of such projects?

original_question: What was the specific period during which the Protocol defining fishing opportunities and financial contributions was approved by the EU?
enhanced_question: What was the specific duration of the approval process for the Protocol defining fishing opportunities and financial contributions, as stipulated in Article 13(3) of this Regulation, prior to its adoption by the European Parliament and the Council on [date]?

original_question: What is the effective date for this Regulation to apply, as stated in Article 2?
enhanced_question: What is the commencement date of this Regulation, as specified in Article 2(1) of the [Regulation Number], and what are the transitional arrangements applicable to Member States, as outlined in Article 2(2)?

original_question: What type of wheat is exempt from the levy under this Regulation?
enhanced_question: What type(s) of wheat are exempted from the applicable levy pursuant to Article 12(3) of this Regulation, as interpreted by the competent authority in accordance with Article 10 of Directive 2006/109/EC?

original_question: What is the effective date of entry into force for this Regulation?
enhanced_question: What is the date of application for this Regulation, as specified in Article 45(2) thereof, and by what mechanism shall Member States be required to implement such provisions, in accordance with the transitional period set forth in Articles 85 and 86 of this Regulation?

original_question: What is the percentage by which customs duty is reduced for products originating from ACP/OCT countries?
enhanced_question: What is the applicable reduction rate of customs duty pursuant to Article 9(1) of this Regulation, as it pertains to goods originating from countries listed in Annex I of Council Decision 2000/244/CFSP of 10 March 2000, establishing a special arrangement for the benefit of certain developing Member States (ACP/OCT countries), and what specific provisions govern the application of such reduction rate by the competent authority?
